examples: "Awww, look at the dead birdie," she says sadly.
Pressel started on the back nine and her birdie streak ended with a bogey on No. 13.
When he finished with a final birdie, any seriousness of the incident gave way to levity.
Two shots behind going to the 18th, Chappell stuffed his approach to tap-in range for birdie.
"The birdie on the last definitely will make my evening a lot better, " he said.
